response:
Jeanette begins with 3 objects. She adds 2 each week to her routine.  
Her progress is steady and consistent. She improves every single week.

* * *

After one week she can juggle 5 objects. The next week brings 7 in her hands.  
She keeps increasing by two each time. Her skill grows with each session.

* * *

At the end of five weeks she reaches her goal. She can now juggle 13 objects.  
Her dedication shows in the numbers. Five weeks of practice pay off.
